Sicher ist jedenfalls, dass den Griechen die Heilkraft dieser schmackhaften Pflanze bekannt war. Und wie könnte es anders sein, die ‚verfressenen‘ Römer wussten genau, wie man Spargeln anbaut.“
9e32d2a6d4.translation: Even over 3,000 years ago, the taste and healing power of asparagus were appreciated. It is believed that the Egyptians knew wild asparagus as part of their diet. 9e558df67a.translation: Although a friend occasionally supplied him with a few sacks of coal from the black market, the house was unbearably cold, and as winter grew harsher, all the water pipes froze.

9e600a369f.translation: The strong contrasts in the proportions of the various dog breeds are very characteristic. Just think of the long-legged marvel as a personification of wind speed (leg length greater than chest height) and the short and crooked-legged 'Dachshund' with its mole-like abilities of digging and burrowing (chest height greater than leg length).

9ee38d73a5.text: „Ernuͤchtert, — bar jener ſtuͤrmiſchen Begeiſterung, die mich ausziehen ließ, der Menſchheit eine neue Welt zu erkaͤmpfen, ſah ich den langen, oͤden Weg vor mir mit all ſeinen kleinen Hinderniſſen, die im Schweiße unſeres Angeſichts uͤberwunden werden ſollten, und mit dem Ziel, das im Nebel der Ferne faſt verſchwand.“
9ee38d73a5.translation: Enlightened — apart from that stormy enthusiasm that made me set out to explore a new world for mankind, I saw the long, desolate path ahead of me with all its small obstacles, which were to be overcome in the sweat of our faces, and with the goal that almost vanished in the fog of the distance.
9ee38d73a5.text_linked: „[[Ernuͤchtert|adjectives/erleuchtet]], — bar jener [[ſtuͤrmiſchen|adjectives/stürmisch]] [[Begeiſterung|nouns/Begeisterung]], [[die|pronouns/die]] [[mich|pronouns/ich]] [[ausziehen|verbs/ausziehen#11]] [[ließ|verbs/lassen]], [[der|pronouns/der_nominativ]] [[Menſchheit|nouns/Menschheit]] [[eine|determiners/eine]] [[neue|adjectives/neu]] [[Welt|nouns/Welt]] [[zu|prepositions/zu]] erkaͤmpfen, ſah [[ich|pronouns/ich]] [[den|determiners/der]] [[langen|adjectives/lang]], [[oͤden|adjectives/öde]] [[Weg|nouns/Weg]] [[vor|prepositions/vor]] [[mir|pronouns/ich]] [[mit|prepositions/mit]] all ſeinen [[kleinen|adjectives/klein]] Hinderniſſen, die [[im|prepositions/in]] Schweiße unſeres [[Angeſichts|nouns/Angesicht]] uͤberwunden [[werden|verbs/werden#2]] [[ſollten|verbs/sollen#4]], [[und|conjunctions/und]] mit [[dem|determiners/der]] [[Ziel|nouns/Ziel]], das im [[Nebel|nouns/Nebel]] der [[Ferne|nouns/Ferne#1]] [[faſt|adverbs/fast]] [[verſchwand|verbs/verschwinden#2]].“
